title: Gerd Binnig
body: Gerd Karl Binnig (German pronunciation: [ˈɡɛʁt ˈbɪnɪç] ; born 20 July 1947) is a German physicist. He is most famous for having won the Nobel Prize in Physics jointly with Heinrich Rohrer in 1986 for the invention of the scanning tunneling microscope.
categories: Foreign associates of the National Academy of Sciences
Grand Crosses with Star and Sash of the Order of Merit of the Federal Republic of Germany
Members of the Norwegian Academy of Science and Letters
